ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant
Salt, pure sea salt, no fortification

ingredients_text: Cold Milled Chia Seeds* (25.57%), Shredded Coconut* (24%), Cold Milled Flax Seeds* (17%), Coconut Palm Sugar* (129%), Acacia Gum* (7%), Cacao Powder* (7%), Hemp Seeds* (5%), Chocolate flavour* (1%), Cinnamon Powder Extract* (0.5%), Sea Salt (0.38%), Bacillus coagulans (0.1%). *organic
